notes: MinerU OCR visibly corrupts the productivity shock text around the production function and some shock-process notation.
Investment adjustment-cost FOC was split across displays and is marked needs_review.
Linearized system equations (28)-(36) were extractable but should be source-level checked against PDF before review promotion.

proposed_catalog_row.Paper: An estimated dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model of the euro area
proposed_catalog_row.ModelType: linearized estimated medium-scale New Keynesian DSGE
proposed_catalog_row.Category: estimated DSGE; sticky prices and wages
proposed_catalog_row.KeyFeatures: external habit; investment adjustment costs; variable capital utilization; Calvo price/wage setting with indexation; ten structural shocks; generalized Taylor rule
